theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) optimized as 'The Obsidian God' Command Center
theme_and_archetype.rationale: The app is a technical AI product showcase, not a typical consumer wedding site. It requires a 'God Mode' / Mission Control aesthetic to emphasize the multi-agent architecture. Colors must remain strict, avoiding any generic AI purple or teal.

mono_data.usage: Logs, trace viewer, node IDs, financial metrics, and timeline times.

primary.description: Signal Orange - used for active nodes, primary execution buttons, and the main workflow path.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) & The Panopticon Grid
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Dense bento grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 with tight gaps (gap-4).
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Generous on marketing/hero (py-24), tight and maximized on dashboard (p-4 to p-6).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts for vendor lists and budget breakdowns. 1px solid borders.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense data, logs, and forms.

component_rules.cards: Do not use generic soft shadows. Use flat surfaces (bg-[#111111]) with sharp 1px borders. Max border-radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px).
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Input/Textarea must have dark background, 1px border, and focus-visible:ring-primary. No native inputs.
component_rules.buttons: Square or 2px radius. High contrast. Primary uses Signal Orange. Secondary uses transparent with 1px border.
component_rules.stepper_graph: Visual Node Graph. Nodes must have status rings (Cyan=Running, Amber=Waiting, Green=Done). Connectors must be animated.
component_rules.log_terminal: Must have a 'matrix' feel. Darkest background (#000), font-mono, text-xs, text-secondary with Cyan/Orange highlights for active agent names.
component_rules.hitl_modal: Human-In-The-Loop requires a massive disruption. Use heavy glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl) to blank out the background, drawing absolute focus to the Approve/Decline actions.

motion_and_interactions.log_streaming: Typewriter effect for logs, auto-scrolling terminal window.
motion_and_interactions.agent_nodes: Pulsing box-shadow or border when an agent is 'Running' (Cyan glow).
motion_and_interactions.data_reveals: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) for vendor cards and timeline events once Compliance agent finishes.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Every interactive element must explicitly define hover text and bg colors.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract node network graph with red spheres and dark lines. Use as a subtle background element in the hero section or 'About the Architecture' section.
hero_abstract.placement: Hero background or Architecture Mermaid diagram background

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against dark background passes APCA minimum ratios. Use text-shadow if layered over the abstract image.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: Every button, input, tab, and specific data card MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'submit-plan-button', 'venue-card-1', 'approve-hitl-button').

page_sections.layout: Grid split: Left (Typography + Request Form), Right (Abstract Graphic + Quick Prompts). Form includes a large textarea and slider/input for budget in INR (₹).
Full width spanning container. 4 horizontal nodes connected by SVG lines. Below it, a terminal window (bg-black) for streaming logs.
Bento Grid Mode B. col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for main Vendor list, md:col-span-4 for Timeline and Budget.
Fixed right sidebar (or toggleable panel) showing Run History and JSONL Trace viewer.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Customize shadcn components to remove generic border-radius and shadows. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx), rely strictly on React JS (.js or .jsx).
Ensure `lucide-react` icons are used to reinforce the technical/terminal aesthetic (e.g., Terminal, GitMerge, CheckCircle).
For the pipeline graph, use a simple custom Flexbox + SVG lines layout or framer-motion. Ensure it clearly visualizes 4 nodes: [Intake] -> [Vendor RAG] -> [Planner] -> [Compliance].
Log streaming is critical: make it look like a real backend console updating in real-time.
Never use placeholder image domains. Only use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs in this JSON.
Remember the currency is Indian Rupees (₹) and the context is Indian events. Ensure formatters display values like ₹8,000,000 correctly.
